hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: input
options.description: Input file to be processed. If not set stdin will be used.

options.name: delimiter
options.description: Delimiter for formatted lines. Default value is new line.

options.name: trim
options.description: If set, the input lines will be trimmed before formatting.

options.name: ignore-empty-lines
options.description: If set, empty or whitespace lines will not be formatted and included in result.

options.name: min-length
options.description: Minimum length for lines to be formatted and included in result.

options.name: output
options.description: Output file name. If not set, stdout will be used.

arguments.name: format
arguments.description: Line format where {0} is initial line.
